phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get parking ticket stamped
phrases.text_local: Onde carimbo o bilhete de estacionamento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih kuh-REEM-boo AW bee-LYEH-tih DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: In Faro, parking validation is often handled at the tourist office counter; no specific machine is mentioned.

likely_response.local: O atendente de turismo pode ajudar no balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo PAW-dih uh-zhoo-DAHR NOO bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: The tourism attendant can help at the counter.

responses.english: The tourism attendant can help at the counter.
responses.phonetic: AW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo PAW-dih uh-zhoo-DAHR NOO bahl-KOWN.
responses.local: O atendente de turismo pode ajudar no balcão.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I print bus schedules?
phrases.text_local: Onde imprimo os horários dos autocarros?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih eemp-REE-moo OOSH oo-RAH-reeoosh DOOSH ow-too-KAH-roosh?
phrases.cultural_note: In southern Portugal, tourist offices often consolidate information points to streamline visitor flow.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao balcão de informações para imprimir os horários.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh eemp-ree-MEER OOSH oo-RAH-reeoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the information counter to print the schedules.

responses.english: Go to the information counter to print the schedules.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh eemp-ree-MEER OOSH oo-RAH-reeoosh.
responses.local: Dirija-se ao balcão de informações para imprimir os horários.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Algarve brochure rack is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o suporte de folhetos do Algarve?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW soo-PAW-ruh-tih DIH foo-LYEH-toosh DOO ahl-GAH-ruh-vih?
phrases.cultural_note: Local offices often group regional materials together for quick tourist access.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para o expositor regional.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW ehsh-poo-zee-TOHR reh-zheeoo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the regional display.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the regional display.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW ehsh-poo-zee-TOHR reh-zheeoo-NAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para o expositor regional.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso reservar uma visita guiada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-zih-ruh-VAHR OO-muh vee-ZEE-tuh GEEAH-duh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao balcão de visitas guiadas.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH vee-ZEE-tuhsh GEEAH-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the guided tour counter.

responses.english: Go to the guided tour counter.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH vee-ZEE-tuhsh GEEAH-duhsh.
responses.local: Dirija-se ao balcão de visitas guiadas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the guided tour counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão das visitas guiadas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DUHSH vee-ZEE-tuhsh GEEAH-duhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese tourist staff use direct spatial references to avoid ambiguity in busy heritage areas.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de visitas guiadas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH vee-ZEE-tuhsh GEEAH-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the guided tour counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the guided tour counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH vee-ZEE-tuhsh GEEAH-duhsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de visitas guiadas.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I pay for souvenirs?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment is at the guided tour counter; tipping is not expected.

likely_response.translation_en: At the counter, near the display.

responses.english: At the counter, near the display.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I pick up free maps?
phrases.cultural_note: Free maps are typically on a rack near the entrance; take only what you need.

likely_response.local: Na estante de mapas, à esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH SHTAHNNG-tih DIH MAH-puhsh, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the map rack, on the left.

responses.english: At the map rack, on the left.
responses.phonetic: NUH SHTAHNNG-tih DIH MAH-puhsh, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.local: Na estante de mapas, à esquerda.
